info.title: Bargainly Market App – API
info.description:
Contratos REST expostos pelo `SecureAPI` client wrapper (`src/utils/secureApi.js`). Todas as chamadas são roteadas via **Netlify Functions** (Backend Proxy Pattern) – nenhuma credencial é exposta no cliente.

> **Base URL (Web):** `/api` → redirecionado via `netlify.toml` para `/.netlify/functions`
>
> **Base URL (Mobile / Capacitor):** `https://app.bargainly.com.br/api`

### Segurança
- **CWE-522** – Zero exposição de credenciais no cliente
- **OWASP A05:2021** – CORS centralizado via `wrapHandler` middleware
- **Rate Limiting** – Redis (3 req/15 min para OTP, 5 tentativas/15 min para verificação)
- **Audit Logging** – Todas as ações críticas auditadas

get.description: Family Finance Budget – Netlify Function CRUD de orçamentos mensais por categoria dentro de uma família. Hierarquia: User → Member → Family → Budget → Transaction Cada família define um teto de gasto (limit_amount) por categoria. O montante gasto real é calculado consultando transactions com o mesmo family_id + category — não é armazenado nesta tabela (sem estado derivado). ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── GET /.netlify/functions/family-finance-budget ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Required: user_id=<uuid>  family_id=<uuid> Optional: budget_id=<uuid>  ← retorna apenas o orçamento da categoria → Returns array de budgets ordenado por category ASC. → Com budget_id retorna o orçamento específico ou 404. ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── POST /.netlify/functions/family-finance-budget ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── body: { user_id:               <uuid>    — required family_id:             <uuid>    — required category:              <string>  — required; um de VALID_CATEGORIES limit_amount:          <number>  — required; > 0 created_by_member_id?: <uuid>    — optional; membro que definiu o orçamento } → 201 com o orçamento criado. → 422 se (family_id, category) já existir. ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── PUT /.netlify/functions/family-finance-budget?budget_id=<uuid> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Required query: budget_id=<uuid> body: { user_id:               <uuid>    — required family_id:             <uuid>    — required limit_amount?:         <number>  — novo limite (> 0) created_by_member_id?: <uuid>    — membro que alterou } Campos imutáveis (ignorados): id, family_id, category, created_at ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── DELETE /.netlify/functions/family-finance-budget ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Required: user_id=<uuid>  family_id=<uuid>  budget_id=<uuid> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── CATEGORIAS VÁLIDAS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── food, home, transport, health, leisure, education, income, other ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── - wrapHandler: CORS allowlist, rate-limiting, JWT validation (CWE-346, CWE-287) - UUID validation on every input (CWE-89) - exec_with_user_context RPC: sets app.current_user_id for RLS context (CWE-284) - Explicit family_id filter on every DB query (service_role bypasses RLS) - Imutable fields stripped before update (CWE-915) - Error sanitisation (CWE-209) MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89:  SQL Injection      (UUID + input validation) - CWE-284: Broken Access      (exec_with_user_context + family_id filter) - CWE-346: Origin Validation  (wrapHandler CORS) - CWE-400: Resource Exhaustion (rate limiting) - CWE-209: Information Exposure (error sanitisation) - CWE-915: Mass Assignment    (immutable field stripping) @author Sentinel Coder @version 1.0.0 — família → orçamento por categoria @migration database/202603110002/add-budgets-table.sql No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

get.description: Family Finance Group – Netlify Function Manage family groups for the FamilyFinanceBot. Fixes the architectural problem: User → Member → Family → Transaction (previously members could not see each other's transactions). ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ENDPOINTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── GET  /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group ?user_id=<uuid> → List all families the user belongs to (with role) GET  /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group ?user_id=<uuid>&family_id=<uuid> → Get a single family with its full member list POST /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group body: { user_id, name } → Create a new family group (caller becomes owner + first member) POST /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group body: { user_id, invite_code } → Join an existing family via invite code PUT  /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group?family_id=<uuid> body: { user_id, name } → Rename a family (owner only) DELETE /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group ?user_id=<uuid>&family_id=<uuid> → Delete a family (owner only) — removes all members via CASCADE DELETE /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group ?user_id=<uuid>&family_id=<uuid>&action=leave → Current user leaves the family ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── - wrapHandler: CORS allowlist, rate-limiting, JWT validation (CWE-346, CWE-287) - UUID validation: prevents SQL injection (CWE-89) - SECURITY DEFINER RPCs: ownership/role enforced at DB level (CWE-284) - Error sanitisation: stack traces never exposed in production (CWE-209) - Owner-only mutations: create, rename, delete, add/remove members MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89:  SQL Injection (UUID + input validation) - CWE-284: Broken Access Control (SECURITY DEFINER RPCs + RLS policies) - CWE-346: Origin Validation (wrapHandler CORS) - CWE-400: Resource Exhaustion (rate limiting in wrapHandler) - CWE-209: Information Exposure (error sanitisation) @author Sentinel Coder @version 1.0.0 @migration database/202603100001/add-family-groups.sql No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Family Finance Group Member – Netlify Function Manage membership within family groups. Part of the fix for: User → Member → Family → Transaction. ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ENDPOINTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── GET  /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group-member ?user_id=<uuid>&family_id=<uuid> → List all members of a family (requires caller to be a member) POST /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group-member body: { user_id, family_id, phone } → Add a member to the family by WhatsApp phone (owner only) PUT  /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group-member body: { user_id, family_id, member_id } → Promote a member to owner (owner only) DELETE /.netlify/functions/family-finance-group-member ?user_id=<uuid>&family_id=<uuid>&member_id=<uuid> → Remove a specific member (owner only; use family-finance-group?action=leave to self-leave) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── - wrapHandler: CORS allowlist, rate-limiting, JWT validation (CWE-346, CWE-287) - UUID validation: prevents SQL injection (CWE-89) - SECURITY DEFINER RPCs: ownership/role enforced at DB level (CWE-284) - No stack trace leaks in production (CWE-209) ROLES ENFORCED: GET:    any member of the family POST:   owner only (add member by phone) PUT:    owner only (promote to owner) DELETE: owner only (remove member); self-leave is via family-finance-group MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89:  SQL Injection - CWE-284: Broken Access Control - CWE-346: Origin Validation - CWE-400: Resource Exhaustion - CWE-209: Information Exposure @author Sentinel Coder @version 1.0.0 @migration database/202603100001/add-family-groups.sql No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

post.description: Cria ou atualiza o perfil do membro (upsert por user_id).

get.description: Family Finance Member Transactions – Netlify Function Dedicated endpoint for the mobile app to query transactions scoped to a member or to a family+member combination. GET  /.netlify/functions/family-finance-member-transactions Required: user_id, member_id Optional: family_id, category, source, month (YYYY-MM), limit, offset — Without family_id: Returns all transactions for `member_id` owned by `user_id`. Ownership is enforced via inner join (members.user_id = user_id). — With family_id: Returns transactions for `member_id` within `family_id`. Caller (user_id) must be a member of the family. Target member_id must also belong to the same family. Prevents lateral access across families (CWE-284). SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION: - wrapHandler: CORS allowlist, rate-limiting, JWT validation (CWE-346, CWE-287) - UUID validation in the service layer prevents SQL injection (CWE-89) - category/source whitelist prevents open enumeration (CWE-20) - Family membership verified at repository level before returning data (CWE-284) - Error sanitisation: stack traces never exposed in production (CWE-209) @author Sentinel Coder @version 1.0.0 No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

get.description:
Retorna o endereço completo (logradouro, bairro, cidade, UF, estado, IBGE, DDD) a partir de um CEP brasileiro.

Proxy seguro para a API pública **ViaCEP** (`https://viacep.com.br`).
Aceita CEP com ou sem máscara (ex: `01310-100` ou `01310100`).

### Segurança
- **CWE-20** – Validação de formato (8 dígitos) antes da chamada externa
- **CWE-209** – Mensagens de erro sanitizadas, sem stack trace
- **OWASP A05:2021** – CORS centralizado via `wrapHandler`

### Arquitetura
`GET /api/get-address-by-cep` → `wrapHandler` → `addressController` → `viaCepService` → ViaCEP API

parameters.name: cep
parameters.description: CEP brasileiro com ou sem máscara. Ex: `01310100` ou `01310-100`.

400.description: CEP ausente ou com formato inválido

value.error: CEP inválido. Informe exatamente 8 dígitos numéricos.

404.description: CEP não encontrado na base ViaCEP

502.description: Erro ao comunicar com a API ViaCEP

example.error: Erro ao consultar serviço de CEP.
Serviço de CEP indisponível. Tente novamente mais tarde.

Get Category Keywords by User Netlify Function to retrieve category keywords for Hybrid Matcher @security UUID validation, RLS enforcement via exec_with_user_context @performance Single optimized RPC query, Edge + Client caching No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Get Company by CNPJ API Endpoint Architecture: MVC Pattern API → Controller → Service → Repository → Database Fetches company data by CNPJ with caching strategy GET /.netlify/functions/get-company-by-cnpj?cnpj=<cnpj> External API: BrasilAPI (https://brasilapi.com.br) Cache: company_cache table (24h expiration) @version 2.0.0 (Refactored to follow MVC) No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Get Dashboard Metrics API Handler Endpoint: /api/get-dashboard-metrics Method: GET Query Parameters: - user_id (required): UUID of the user Returns dashboard metrics including: - Shopping lists status (completed/total) - Cart total value - Collaborators - Integration status Security: Backend Proxy Pattern (Supabase credentials server-side only) Architecture: MVC Pattern (Controller → Service → Repository) No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Endpoint público consumido pelo mobile app para obter o estado das feature flags em runtime, sem necessidade de rebuild.

Suporte a dois modos:
- **Sem parâmetro** → retorna todas as flags (`{ flags: { [key]: boolean }, cachedAt: ISO8601 }`)
- **Com `?key=<k>`** → retorna o valor de uma flag específica (`{ key, enabled }`).

As flags são armazenadas no Supabase (`feature_flags`) e cacheadas em memória por **60 segundos**. Toggling via Supabase Table Editor, sem redeploy.

### Segurança
- **CWE-20** – Sanitização do query param `key` (regex `^[a-z0-9_-]+$`)
- **CWE-209** – Erros retornam HTTP 422 com mensagem genérica (sem stack trace)
- **OWASP A05:2021** – CORS centralizado via `wrapHandler`

### Arquitetura
`GET /api/get-feature-flags` → `wrapHandler` → `featureFlagController` → `featureFlagService` → `featureFlagRepository` → Supabase

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Chave da flag (ex: `reviewer_bypass`). Apenas letras minúsculas, números, underscore e hífen. Omita para retornar todas as flags.

cachedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp da última atualização do cache

405.description: Método não permitido — apenas GET é aceito

422.description: Parâmetro `key` inválido (formato não permitido ou ausente quando esperado). Mensagem genérica por OPSEC (CWE-209).

get.description: Get Financial Data by Categories API Endpoint Retrieves financial breakdown by product categories with optional filters GET /.netlify/functions/get-financial-by-categories?user_id=<uuid>&month=<YYYY-MM>&category=<string>&market_id=<uuid> Query Parameters: - user_id (required): User UUID - month (optional): Filter by month in YYYY-MM format - category (optional): Filter by specific category name - market_id (optional): Filter by market UUID - limit (optional): Maximum results (default: 100, max: 1000) - offset (optional): Pagination offset (default: 0) SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION: - UUID Validation: All UUID inputs validated via regex (CWE-89) - Month Format Validation: YYYY-MM regex prevents injection - Category Sanitization: Length limit + encoding (XSS prevention) - Explicit User Filtering: All queries filtered by validated user_id (CWE-284) - Limit Validation: Prevents resource exhaustion (CWE-400) - Service Role Key: RLS bypassed securely with explicit filtering - Error Sanitization: Production-safe error messages (CWE-209) MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89: SQL Injection (UUID + month regex validation) - CWE-284: Improper Access Control (Explicit user_id filtering) - CWE-79: XSS (Category sanitization, though backend context) - CWE-400: Resource Exhaustion (Limit caps) - CWE-209: Information Exposure (Error sanitization) @author Sentinel Coder @version 2.0.0 (MVC Refactored) @returns {Object} Array of categories with aggregated financial data No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Get Financial Data by Shopping Lists API Endpoint Retrieves financial breakdown by shopping lists with optional filters GET /.netlify/functions/get-financial-by-lists?user_id=<uuid>&month=<YYYY-MM>&market_id=<uuid> Query Parameters: - user_id (required): User UUID - month (optional): Filter by month in YYYY-MM format - market_id (optional): Filter by market UUID - limit (optional): Maximum results (default: 100, max: 1000) - offset (optional): Pagination offset (default: 0) SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION: - UUID Validation: All UUID inputs validated via regex (CWE-89) - Month Format Validation: YYYY-MM regex prevents injection - Explicit User Filtering: All queries filtered by validated user_id (CWE-284) - Limit Validation: Prevents resource exhaustion - Service Role Key: RLS bypassed securely with explicit filtering - Error Sanitization: Production-safe error messages (CWE-209) MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89: SQL Injection (UUID regex + month format validation) - CWE-284: Improper Access Control (Explicit user_id filtering) - CWE-400: Resource Exhaustion (Limit validation and caps) - CWE-209: Information Exposure (Error sanitization) @author Sentinel Coder @version 2.0.0 (MVC Refactored) @returns {Object} Array of shopping lists with financial data No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Retorna todos os itens comprados (listas ativas e concluídas) dentro de um período, com dados pré-agregados por categoria, mercado e dia. Projetado **exclusivamente** para o app mobile Bargainly.

Aceita período predefinido **ou** faixa de datas explícita:
- **Predefinido:** `period=7D` | `15D` | `30D` | `60D`
- **Explícito:** `start_date` + `end_date` em `YYYY-MM-DD` ou `DD/MM/YYYY`

### Formato de Resposta
```json
{
  "meta": { "user_id": "...", "period": { "start": "2026-02-04", "end": "2026-03-04", "label": "30D" }, "generated_at": "..." },
  "summary": { "total_items": 42, "total_lists": 5, "total_markets": 3, "total_amount": 487.50, "average_amount_per_list": 97.50 },
  "by_category": [{ "category": "Hortifruti", "items_count": 8, "total_amount": 120.00, "percentage": 24.6, "items": [...] }],
  "by_market": [{ "market_name": "Angeloni", "lists_count": 3, "total_amount": 310.00, "by_category": [...] }],
  "daily": [{ "date": "2026-03-01", "total": 97.50, "lists_count": 1 }]
}
```

### Segurança
- **CWE-89** – `user_id` validado via UUID regex; datas validadas por regex antes de chegar ao SQL
- **CWE-284** – RPC `get_items_by_period` com `SECURITY DEFINER` e filtro `user_id` explícito em PostgreSQL
- **CWE-346** – CORS centralizado via `wrapHandler` (origin allowlist + rate limiting)
- **CWE-209** – Stack traces nunca expostos em produção; mensagem genérica em 422/500

### Arquitetura
`GET /api/get-financial-items-by-period` → `wrapHandler` → `financialController.getItemsByPeriod` → `financialService.getItemsByPeriod` → `financialRepository.getItemsByPeriod` → Supabase RPC `get_items_by_period`

@author Sentinel Coder
@version 1.0.0
@migration database/202603050001/create_get_items_by_period_function.sql

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Data início em `YYYY-MM-DD` ou `DD/MM/YYYY`. Obrigatório se `period` não for informado.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Data fim em `YYYY-MM-DD` ou `DD/MM/YYYY`. Obrigatório se `period` não for informado.

200.description: Dados financeiros aggregados por período, categoria e mercado

422.description: Parâmetros inválidos (user_id ausente/inválido, período inválido, datas mal formatadas ou end_date < start_date)

example.error: Provide either a preset period (7D, 15D, 30D, 60D) or both start_date and end_date

get.description: Get Financial Summary API Endpoint Retrieves comprehensive financial statistics for a user GET /.netlify/functions/get-financial-summary?user_id=<uuid> SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION: - UUID Validation: Strict regex prevents SQL injection (CWE-89) - Service Role Key: Bypasses RLS securely with explicit user_id filtering (CWE-284) - Error Sanitization: No stack traces in production (CWE-209) - CORS Configured: Allows authorized cross-origin requests - Read-Only: GET method only, no data mutation (CWE-352) MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89: SQL Injection (UUID regex + RPC function with parameterized query) - CWE-284: Improper Access Control (RLS enforced via user_id in RPC) - CWE-209: Information Exposure (Sanitized error messages) - CWE-352: CSRF (Stateless GET, no state mutation) @author Sentinel Coder @version 2.0.0 (MVC Refactored) @returns {Object} Financial summary with totals, averages, favorites No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

get.summary: Listar listas de compras por mercado (Mobile)
get.description:
Retorna listas de compras ativas e concluídas de um usuário filtradas por mercado. Nunca retorna listas canceladas ou deletadas (soft-deleted).

Formato de resposta: `{ total_lists, total_amount, lists[] }`

### Segurança
- **CWE-89**: UUID regex previne SQL injection
- **CWE-284**: Filtragem explícita por `user_id` + `market_id` garante isolamento de dados
- **CWE-209**: Mensagens de erro sanitizadas em produção

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filtro de status. Se omitido retorna listas ativas **e** concluídas.

200.description: Sumário de listas de compras por mercado

total_amount.description: Soma dos valores totais de todas as listas (2 casas decimais)

get.description:
Resolve um usuário a partir do número de telefone recebido pelo WhatsApp bot.

Aceita todos os formatos enviados pelo WhatsApp:
- `5541999999999` (13 dígitos, formato BR internacional)
- `+5541999999999` (com prefixo `+`)
- `554199999 9999` (com espaços)

O número é normalizado internamente (somente dígitos, 10-15 chars) antes da consulta ao banco.

Retorna apenas **campos não-sensíveis**: `id`, `phone`, `email`, `name`.

### Segurança
- **CWE-20** – Validação e normalização de telefone antes de qualquer query
- **CWE-89** – SQL Injection prevenido por RPC parametrizada (somente dígitos)
- **CWE-200** – Projeção de campos: nenhum dado sensível exposto
- **CWE-209** – Stack traces nunca expostos (mensagem genérica em 500)
- **OWASP A05:2021** – CORS centralizado via `wrapHandler`
- **CWE-400** – Rate limiting via `wrapHandler`

### Arquitetura
`GET /api/get-user-by-phone?phone=<phone>` → `wrapHandler` → `authController.getUserByPhone` → `authService.getUserByPhone` → `authRepository.getUserByPhone` → RPC `get_user_by_phone`

parameters.name: phone

Get User Settings API Endpoint Retrieves user settings/preferences from the preferences table GET /.netlify/functions/get-user-settings?user_id=<uuid> Architecture: API → Controller → Service → Repository → Database No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Get User Statistics API Endpoint Architecture: MVC Pattern API → Controller → Service → Repository → Database Retrieves comprehensive statistics for a user by aggregating data from shopping lists GET /.netlify/functions/get-user-statistics?user_id=<uuid> SECURITY IMPLEMENTATION: - Backend Proxy Pattern: Database credentials server-side only - Input validation: UUID format validation in controller layer - Proper error handling: No stack trace leakage in production - Read-only: GET method only, no data mutation - CORS configured: Allows cross-origin requests from authorized domains MITIGATED VULNERABILITIES: - CWE-89: SQL Injection (UUID validation + parameterized queries) - CWE-284: Improper Access Control (explicit user_id filtering) - CWE-209: Information Exposure (Error messages sanitized in production) - CWE-352: CSRF (Stateless GET endpoint, no state mutation) @version 2.0.0 (Refactored to follow MVC) No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

post.description: Netlify Function - Mark Beta Access as Used Endpoint: POST /api/mark-beta-used Body: { phone: string, code: string } Segurança: - Validação de método HTTP (apenas POST) - CORS configurado - Rate limiting (5 tentativas por 15 min por IP) - Validação de body params no controller - Erros sem exposição de stack trace Fluxo: API → Controller → Service → Repository → Database (RPC) @version 1.0.0 No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

Emite um novo `accessToken` (15 min) e um `refreshToken` rotacionado (7 dias). O token antigo é revogado imediatamente após uso (**token rotation** — CWE-384 prevention).

Usado pelo app móvel quando o access token expira. Armazene o novo `refreshToken` (substitui o anterior).

### Segurança
- **CWE-384**: Token rotation — cada refresh revoga o token antigo e emite um novo
- **CWE-522**: Apenas o SHA-256 do refresh token é armazenado no banco (nunca o raw)
- **CWE-209**: Mensagens de erro sanitizadas em produção
- **OWASP A07:2021**: Falha de identificação e autenticação prevenida via TTL curto no access token

### Arquitetura
`POST /api/refresh-token` → `wrapHandler` → `buildHandler(authCtrl)` → `sessionService.refreshSession()` → `sessionRepository`

@version 1.0.0

refreshToken.description: Refresh token opaco de 96 caracteres hex emitido pelo endpoint `/verify-otp` ou pelo último `/refresh-token`

401.description: Refresh token inválido, expirado ou já revogado

code.description: `SESSION_INVALID` = token não encontrado ou revogado; `SESSION_EXPIRED` = TTL de 7 dias ultrapassado

post.summary: Validar sessão (JWT Bearer ou Legacy UUID)
post.description:
Valida uma sessão ativa via **estratégia dupla**:

**Estratégia 1 — JWT Bearer (preferencial para mobile):**  
Envie `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` no header. O endpoint decodifica e verifica a assinatura HS256 sem consultar o banco.

**Estratégia 2 — Legacy UUID (backward compat para web):**  
Envie `{ user_id }` no body. O endpoint consulta o Supabase e retorna o perfil.

A resposta inclui o campo `authMethod` (`"jwt"` ou `"legacy"`) para o cliente saber qual caminho foi utilizado.

### Erros JWT
| Código | Descrição |
|---|---|
| `JWT_EXPIRED` | Access token expirado — chame `POST /api/refresh-token` |
| `JWT_INVALID` | Token inválido, adulterado ou com assinatura incorreta |

### Segurança
- **CWE-208**: Comparação de assinatura HMAC com `timingSafeEqual` (sem timing side-channel)
- **CWE-284**: JWT carrega `sub` (user ID) — sem lookup de banco para validação
- **CWE-209**: Mensagens de erro sanitizadas em produção

### Arquitetura
`POST /api/validate-session` → `wrapHandler` → `buildHandler(authCtrl)` → `ctrl.validateAccessToken()` | `ctrl.validateUserSession()`

@version 3.0.0

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: JWT Bearer token. Formato: `Bearer <accessToken>`. Quando presente, usa Estratégia 1 (JWT).

user_id.description: UUID do usuário (Estratégia 2 — Legacy). Ignorado se `Authorization` header estiver presente.

authMethod.description: Estratégia utilizada para validar a sessão

400.description: user_id ausente ou em formato de UUID inválido (Estratégia 2)

get.description: Netlify Function - Beta Access Verification Endpoint: GET /api/verify-beta-access?phone=<value>&code=<value> Segurança: - Validação de método HTTP (apenas GET) - CORS configurado - Rate limiting (10 tentativas por 15 min por IP) - Validação de query params no controller - Erros sem exposição de stack trace Fluxo: API → Controller → Service → Repository → Database (RPC) @version 1.0.0 No `SecureAPI` wrapper found — endpoint may need wrapping.

post.description:
Valida o código OTP e retorna o perfil do usuário autenticado **junto com tokens JWT** para autenticação nas chamadas subsequentes (mobile-first).

**Rate Limit:** 5 tentativas por 15 minutos por e-mail.

Após verificação bem-sucedida, armazene:
- `accessToken` → `sessionStorage` (tab-scoped, 15 min)
- `refreshToken` → `localStorage` (persistente, 7 dias)

Quando o `accessToken` expirar, chame `POST /api/refresh-token` para renovar a sessão.

Utilizado por `SecureAPI.verifyOTP()`.
post.x-changelog: v2.0.0 — emite accessToken + refreshToken após verificação bem-sucedida. Clientes devem armazenar accessToken em sessionStorage e refreshToken em localStorage.

200.description: OTP verificado – usuário autenticado com JWT session

AddressByCepResponse.description: Endereço completo retornado pela API ViaCEP

OTPVerifyResponse.description: Resposta do verify-otp v2.0.0+. Inclui tokens JWT para autenticação móvel.

accessToken.description: JWT access token HS256 com TTL de 15 min. Use como `Authorization: Bearer <token>` em todas as chamadas à API.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token opaco (96 chars hex) com TTL de 7 dias. Armazene em localStorage. Use em `POST /api/refresh-token`.

expiresIn.description: TTL do accessToken em segundos (900 = 15 min)

refreshExpiresIn.description: TTL do refreshToken em segundos (604800 = 7 dias)

JWTSessionResponse.description: Par de tokens JWT emitido ou renovado. Retornado por `POST /api/refresh-token`.

accessToken.description: JWT access token HS256 (TTL: 15 min). Algoritmo: HS256. Payload: `{ sub, email, name, type: 'access', iss: 'bargainly-api', iat, exp }`.

refreshToken.description: Novo refresh token rotacionado (96 chars hex, TTL: 7 dias). Substitui o token anterior — armazene o novo valor.

UserByPhoneResponse.description: Projeção mínima de usuário retornada pelo endpoint do WhatsApp bot (CWE-200: apenas campos não-sensíveis).

BadRequest.description: Requisição inválida – parâmetros ausentes ou incorretos

MethodNotAllowed.description: Método HTTP não permitido para este endpoint

example.error: Não foi possível processar sua solicitação. Tente novamente.
